* chore: bump version to 3.0.0-alpha.170

Fixes #997 - Phantom Claude popups on Windows

Added windowsHide: true to execSync and spawn calls in
headless-worker-executor.ts to prevent phantom console
windows on Windows.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
